case_title: GUSTAVO CAMACHO VS. DANNY CHI HO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMACHO, GUSTAVO AS TO DEFENDANT HO, DANNY CHI AN INDIVIDUAL DBA VIRGINIA INTERIOR DECORATION DESIGN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMACHO, GUSTAVO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, DANNY CHI AN INDIVIDUAL DBA VIRGINIA INTERIOR DECORATION DESIGN $5,371.73 PRINCIPAL, $217.02 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,768.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
